productDisplayName: Kenneth Cole Men Silver Dial Chronograph Watch
description: kenneth cole New york is manufactured using the highest quality materials and craftsmanship.  The incorporation of both traditional and contemporary design philosophy result in a unique and modern product.  Choose this watch to display your sophisticated and discerning taste in accessories.Case diameter: 40 mmCase thickness: 5 mmDial shape: RoundWarranty: Two yearsStainless steel round caseBlack leather strap with a tang claspSilver dial with metallic handsBranding at the 12-hour markDate aperture across the 1 to 4-hour markSubdial for seconds displayScrew to reset timeSolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability
